questionHtml: Explain why the 1H NMR spectrum of C3H6O, produced in (d)(i), shows only one signal.
markschemeHtml:
only one hydrogen environment
OR
methyl groups symmetrical «around carbonyl group» ✔

NOTE: Accept “all hydrogens belong to methyl groups «which are in identical positions»”.

meta.title: Explain why the 1H NMR spectrum of C3H6O, produced in (d)(i), shows only one signal.
